description: You are a solar energy performance analyst at Clearview Energy Partners. Prepare a quarterly operations review for the 5 MW Clearview Solar Farm using the generation records at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/clearview_solar_data.csv and specifications at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/array_specifications.csv. Create a multi-sheet performance report workbook including industry-standard KPIs (energy production, capacity factor, performance ratio/specific yield), identified underperforming arrays, and detected outage events. Save the final report to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/solar_performance_report.xlsx.
